BatteryNote.title: Battery Note
BatteryNote.description: A note about battery health or performance recorded by the user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the note.

text.description: The transcribed text of the note.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the note was created.

batteryLevel.description: The battery level at the time of recording.

/notes.description: Collection of battery notes recorded by users.
